raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX, 2026 I was notified that a charge was being declined through text. I called Citi Card to let them know this was not my charge and neither were XXXX other charges : {$480.00}, {$41000.00} and {$1400.00} totaling over {$3000.00}. All the charges took place on XXXX XXXX, 2026 within XXXXXX/XX/XXXX. They said they would put it as disputed. I looked at my account and see they disputed XXXX other charges to the same business. I called Citi to tell them the XXXX charges for on XXXX XXXX for {$82.00} and XX/XX/XXXX for {$96.00} should not be disputed. Those are my charges. I have calledXX/XX/XXXX times. I spoke to a supervisor at Citi Cards XXXX weeks ago, XX/XX/year>2026, and she stated those charges are fraudulent and would resubmit for my account to be credited. They denied it again.
